title: dacryodes rugosa
intro: Dacryodes rugosa, also known as the Canarium or Panamericano tree, is a tropical evergreen species native to the Americas. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Dacryodes rugosa include reducing pain and inflammation, improving wound healing, and aiding in the management of diabetes and cardiovascular diseases. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as used in traditional medicine to create ointments and salves that promote skin health and reduce oxidative stress.
